title: Mutual Funds Are Investing In 'Survivors' For 2023
text: Stock picking is an art in a tough market. Learn which companies mutual fund managers believe can grow during economic uncertainty.

title: CooperCompanies Sets Annual Meeting and Stockholder Record Dates
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Dec. 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced that it will hold its next annual meeting of stockholders on Wednesday, March 15, 2023. Stockholders of record as of the close of business on January 19, 2023, will be eligible to vote on matters presented in the Company's proxy statement, including electing its slate of directors.

title: Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cooper Companies, Inc. (NYSE:COO ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call December 8, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kim Duncan - VP, IR & Risk Management Albert White - President & CEO Brian Andrews - EVP, CFO & Treasurer Conference Call Participants Jonathan Block - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Joanne Wuensch - Citigroup Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler & Co. title: The Cooper Companies (COO) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -11% and 1.03%, respectively, for the quarter ended October 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CooperCompanies Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Dec. 08, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced financial results for its fiscal fourth quarter and full year ended October 31, 2022.

title: Cooper Companies (COO) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Cooper Companies' (COO) fiscal fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect segmental strength.

title: These Are the 10 Biggest Companies Issuing Earnings Reports Next Week
text: The third quarter 2022 earnings season is almost over. Over 70% of S&P 500 companies surpassed the EPS expectations, a drop of 5.7% from the second quarter.
